recentToolCalls.outcomeSummary: FAILED! Unable to resolve HTML element to operate with.

evidence: Falling back to automation script issue from generic error content.

remediationSteps.details:
Review the Playwright test and any Donobu tool invocations around the failure.
Align the scripted steps with the intended business flow.
Re-run the test or Donobu flow once the script adjustments are in place to validate the fix.

additionalDataRequests.description: Review Playwright trace, Donobu flow metadata, and browser console logs.
